case_title: PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. vs. SAKASHITA, EIJI et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. SERVED DEC-22-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAKASHITA, EIJI
PHOTOCOPY FOR PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT SAKASHITA, EIJI SHIMODA, KEIKO DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED
DECLARATION RE: LOST SUMMONS AND ORDER THEREON FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAKASHITA, EIJI SHIMODA, KEIKO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 150 FONT BLVD #6-K, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT- CRC 522
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND SUPPLEMENTAL ORDER- JUDGMENT UPON STIPULATION TO ENTER DEFAULT OF JAN-03-1996 SET ASIDE, JUDGMENT OF JAN-03-1996 SET ASIDE
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER AND ORDER FOR ENTRY OF AMENDED JUDGMENT BASED ON STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION GRANTED - 2 - QUIDACHAY. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. SERVED DEC-18-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHIMODA, KEIKO
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. JUDGMENT OF JAN-12-1996 SET ASIDE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAKASHITA, EIJI SHIMODA, KEIKO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 150 FONT BLVD #6K $2,897.06 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,897.06, LEASE FORFEITED, STIPULATED- SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT SAKASHITA, EIJI SHIMODA, KEIKO
